My Reading & Writing Tools: A Vocabulary Pack for Grades 3-5

EN-ES Printable Resource

My Reading & Writing Tools: A Vocabulary Pack for Grades 3-5

This vocabulary pack introduces essential English and Spanish terms related to reading and writing for newcomer ELL students in grades 3-5. It includes a mini-book, three engaging worksheets, and comprehensive teacher notes.

TopicReading & Writing
Age Band3-5
Pack Typevocabulary pack
LanguageEN-ES

✨ What's Inside

  • 15 vocabulary items
  • 3 worksheets
  • Mini-book (8 pages)
  • Teacher notes & answer key

📖 How to Use

Introduce the vocabulary using flashcards and visuals. Read the mini-book aloud as a shared reading activity, pausing to discuss key vocabulary. Use the worksheets for independent practice, small group work, or as a review. Encourage students to create their own sentences or short paragraphs using the new words.

LanternELLMini-Book 1/2📄 Printable Pack

Mini-Book: Our Reading and Writing Journey

Print double-sided, fold in half, and staple to create a mini-book.

1
Our Reading and Writing Journey
Nuestro Viaje de Lectura y Escritura
2
We love to read! We open a book and find an amazing story.
¡Nos encanta leer! Abrimos un libro y encontramos una historia asombrosa.
3
Every story has an author who writes the words.
Cada historia tiene un autor que escribe las palabras.
4
An illustrator draws the pictures for the book.
Un ilustrador dibuja las imágenes para el libro.
Mar 18, 2026lanternell.comPage 6 / 14
LanternELLMini-Book 2/2📄 Printable Pack
5
When we write, we use letters to make words.
Cuando escribimos, usamos letras para formar palabras.
6
Words make sentences, and sentences make a paragraph.
Las palabras forman oraciones, y las oraciones forman un párrafo.
7
After we write, we edit and revise our work. We look for the main idea and important details.
Después de escribir, editamos y revisamos nuestro trabajo. Buscamos la idea principal y los detalles importantes.
8
We can also write a summary of what we read or wrote! Reading and writing help us learn!
¡También podemos escribir un resumen de lo que leímos o escribimos! ¡Leer y escribir nos ayudan a aprender!

coloring

LanternELLTeacher Notes📄 Printable Pack

Teacher Notes

🎯 Objective

Students will be able to identify and use basic vocabulary related to reading and writing in English and Spanish, improving their comprehension and expression skills.

💡 Suggested Use

Introduce the vocabulary using flashcards and visuals. Read the mini-book aloud as a shared reading activity, pausing to discuss key vocabulary. Use the worksheets for independent practice, small group work, or as a review. Encourage students to create their own sentences or short paragraphs using the new words.

📦 Materials Needed

  • Printed vocabulary list or flashcards
  • Printed mini-book (one per student)
  • Printed worksheets (one per student)
  • Pencils
  • Crayons or colored pencils
  • Scissors (for mini-book assembly)

🔀 Differentiation Tips

  • **Support:** Provide sentence starters for discussions or writing tasks. Allow students to draw responses instead of writing. Pre-teach vocabulary with realia or explicit definitions. Pair students with a stronger English speaker for collaborative activities.
  • **Challenge:** Encourage students to write their own definitions for the vocabulary words in English. Ask them to create a short story or a summary of a text they've read using multiple vocabulary words. Have them identify the main idea and supporting details in a short text.

Answer Key

ws-3
